creator: inbox@alleghenycomputer.com
text:
Created attachment 221483
Command Line Output

Current version v2.21_3 Failing to build using Portmaster on multiple workstations running FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE-p2.

I have attached a file containing the error message I am seeing.

v2.21_2 was installed on these machines and working prior to trying to update to v2.21_3.

I followed up with MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE with the same results.  Also, tried with Doc's enabled as well as disabled.
